summary: BUG-017 — add slot.scrollIntoView({block:'nearest',behavior:'smooth'}) inside refreshBadges selected.forEach in main.js, immediately after classList.add('is-selected'). Forces browser to paint the off-screen 3rd-card glow by bringing the selection into viewport. 'nearest' makes it a no-op for already-visible selections, so cards 1/2 in the top rows are unaffected.
